clips.name: ep2-teaser-1-fable-yanked
clips.title: The government deleted the best AI on Earth 💀
clips.description: 3 days after launch, the US ordered Anthropic to pull Fable 5 — its most powerful model — offline worldwide. Priced out AND locked out: welcome to the permanent underclass. 🎙️ Permanent Underpod Ep 2 — full episode linked. #AI #Anthropic #ClaudeAI #Fable #tech #podcast

clips.name: ep2-teaser-2-roll-the-dice
clips.title: Why retail traders can't stop gambling 🎲
clips.description: Scratchers, perps, prediction markets — same impulse, more leverage. "I want money now… roll the dice, get out of the permanent underclass." Now that the US legalized 100x perps, it's everywhere. 🎙️ Permanent Underpod Ep 2. #crypto #perps #bitcoin #trading #leverage #podcast

clips.name: ep2-teaser-3-rent-zinger
clips.title: Jamie Dimon vs Coinbase in one sentence 🏦
clips.description: The GENIUS Act fight, distilled: Coinbase wants a bank's privileges without a bank's rules — "the right to collect the rent, but not the obligation to keep the house." 🎙️ Permanent Underpod Ep 2. #stablecoins #GENIUSAct #JamieDimon #Coinbase #crypto #fintech

clips.name: ep2-teaser-4-opus-doi-vertical
clips.title: "Opus is like 'doi'" — life after the govt took our AI 🧠
clips.description: After the US pulled Fable 5 off the market, we're stuck back on Opus — and the downgrade is brutal: "okay Opus, pick up where Fable left off… and Opus is like 'doi.' Clearly not on the same level." Mourning the smartest AI we ever had. 🎙️ Permanent Underpod Ep 2 — full episode linked. #AI #Anthropic #ClaudeAI #Opus #Fable #podcast #shorts

clips.name: ep2-teaser-5-dog-shrooms-vertical
clips.title: The dog ate the wrong shrooms 🍄
clips.description: Pico the dog wanted to go on a vision quest, so he ate some mushrooms in the garden. Wrong kind. They almost killed him. (Spoiler: he made it — full recovery arc in the episode.) 🎙️ Permanent Underpod Ep 2 — full episode linked. #dogs #pets #podcast #shorts #funny

clips.name: ep2-segment-perps-main-event
clips.title: Perpetual Futures Explained — and Why the US Just Legalized 100x Leverage | Permanent Underpod Ep 2
clips.description: Our resident perps guy breaks down perpetual futures from scratch: what they are, how the funding rate pegs them to spot, why BitMEX invented them, liquidations and socialized losses, and how an on-chain venue started leading price discovery on oil. Then the news: the CFTC cleared regulated US perps (Kalshi, Kraken, Coinbase) — maturation, or a leverage bazooka with a federal stamp? Not financial advice; our own opinions, not our employers'. 🎙️ Full episode linked. #perps #perpetualfutures #crypto #bitcoin #hyperliquid #trading #DeFi

clips.name: ep2-segment-fable-yanked
clips.title: The US Government Pulled the Best AI Off the Market — 3 Days After Launch | Permanent Underpod Ep 2
clips.description: Anthropic shipped Fable 5 — its most powerful model — and three days later the US government ordered it (and the "Mythos" class) shut off worldwide over a claimed narrow jailbreak. We process the grief: priced out at $10/$50 per million tokens, then locked out entirely, and what it means that a government can switch off a commercial AI used by hundreds of millions overnight. Not affiliated with any employer. 🎙️ Full episode linked. #AI #Anthropic #ClaudeAI #Fable #tech #podcast
